title: Pick Me Up!
description: With this mod you can pick up any mob in the game even ones bigger than you..
body:
**With this mod you can pick up any mob in the game..**




_this mod is compatable with any other mod that has animals, though for it to work the animal must have a spawn egg._






<details>
<summary>How?</summary>

To pick up any mob just shift and right-click to turn the mob of your choice into a spawn egg which you can place down!
</details>
